nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: London 01 (21 years old), confident and alluring, with voluminous, tightly defined blonde and brown curly hair with bangs, tanned healthy skin with realistic pores/texture, wearing a black fishnet bodysuit and a silver body chain. Messy hotel room bathroom, harsh direct flash illuminating her with deep shadows. Close-up mirror selfie, London 01 leaning into the mirror, holding the phone slightly high. Medium-quality smartphone photo, social media portrait, low-resolution, visible sensor noise/grain, mild JPEG compression artifacts, camera lens smudge, slightly blurry from slight camera movement, high contrast unfiltered look.

nodes.title: Positive Prompt
widgets_values: a candid sun-drenched close-up selfie showing Sydney01 with long dark hair tucked beneath a black baseball cap she has large expressive hazel eyes with thin lips and subtle makeup, warm natural skin texture, and a slow relaxed pool-day expression as she angles the camera slightly downward.  and layered gold jewelry that glints under the harsh midday light. Her leopard-print triangle bikini top hugs her very large naturally shaped breasts, with sharp sunlight casting tight shadows along her collarbones and the edge of the fabric. Behind her, soft chaos—sun loungers, an off-white umbrella, and dense green foliage—blur slightly from the shallow depth of field, creating a spontaneous HMReal summertime vibe

nodes.title: Bad Result?
widgets_values:
## Bad results? 
Change the denoise values in the KSampler above, recommended ranger is 0.55-0.85
